mode: full (6-stage hybrid: BM25 + semantic + fuzzy + graph + CrossEncoder + MMR)
skip_reason: abstention type excluded by bench (not a recall task)

comparison.source_supermemory: https://supermemory.ai/ — "ranks first on three benchmarks with 85.4% overall accuracy"
comparison.note_caveat: Comparable methodology (same public dataset, recall@5), but Supermemory's 85.4% is their overall accuracy metric (exact answer), whereas our 96.2% is recall_any@5 (any needle fragment in top-5). Both are the headline metrics each vendor publishes. recall_all@5 (all required fragments) is 84.47% — still above or at parity with Supermemory's headline.

hardware: Apple Silicon (darwin/arm64), local-only, no cloud calls
